meta.title: Oak | The Context Library for you and your agent
meta.description: Oak keeps everything you read in one place, then puts an AI research agent on top that searches and answers across all of it — with citations you can open.

hero.tagline: A research agent for everything you read.
hero.subhead: Keep everything you read in one place — then let an AI search and answer across all of it, with citations you can open.
hero.shotAlt: Oak answering a question in context with rendered math and markdown

bento.title: Your sources, notes, and answers in one place.

ask.title: Read between the lines
ask.desc: Open any document and ask Oak what it means — answered in context with formatted notes, code, and rendered math.
ask.alt: Oak answering a question in context with rendered math and markdown

browse.title: The web, without leaving
browse.desc: Search, open a link, or just ask the AI in a new tab. Read live pages with your logins intact, then capture what matters.
browse.alt: Oak's in-app browser new-tab search routing to the web or the AI

library.title: Everything you keep, searchable
library.desc: Every PDF, article, and web snapshot in collections and tags — full-text search that even understands 中日韩.
library.alt: Oak's library with collections, tags, and full-text search

oakai.title: A partner that read it all
oakai.desc: Chat with an assistant that knows your whole library and answers with citations you can open and check.
oakai.alt: Oak's OakAI assistant answering from across the library

models.title: Use any model. Switch anytime.
models.subhead: The best brain for each question — from the frontier labs to a local model running on your Mac. Your choice, every time.
